scripts.local-install: bash -c 'cd ../../.. && ./node_modules/.bin/nx run-many -t build -p @copilotkit/react-core @copilotkit/react-ui @copilotkit/runtime @copilotkitnext/shared' && bash -c 'cd ../../../.. && cd ag-ui && npx -y pnpm@10 install && npx -y pnpm@10 run build' && COPILOTKIT_LOCAL=1 pnpm install
